news.title: Galaxy Slashes Clarity Act's 2026 Odds to 50% as Senate Time Runs Short
news.summary: The digital asset firm cut its odds of the market structure bill passing this year to a coin toss, pointing to a shrinking Senate calendar.

news.title: XRP Ledger's 'Missing Layer' Draws Closer as Developers Test Lending, Credit Features: Ripple
news.summary: Ripple outlined how the XRP Ledger Lending Protocol would provide institutions with a novel way to structure loans directly on-chain.

news.title: California Strikes Deal With Anthropic to Bring Claude AI to State Agencies
news.summary: Anthropic’s agreement makes Claude the first AI tool available to all state agencies and local governments, at half price.

news.title: Bitcoin balances $60K tightrope as US stocks rebound on fresh Iran peace deal hopes
